faqs.question: Why are crickets common in Bayside homes?
faqs.answer: Bayside's lush landscaping, mature trees, and proximity to parks and green spaces provide ideal cricket habitats. These insects are attracted to moisture and vegetation, making their way into basements, garages, and crawl spaces, especially in fall when seeking warm shelter.

faqs.question: What does your cricket control service include?
faqs.answer: Our $350-$550 cricket control service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points and nesting areas, targeted treatment using safe and effective products, exclusion recommendations, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. We also provide prevention tips to keep crickets from returning.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in Bayside?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 1-2 weeks, depending on the severity of the infestation. Our technicians can provide same-day or next-day service to Bayside residents.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are highly effective against crickets while remaining safe for children and pets when applied properly. Our technicians take extra precautions in homes with sensitive occupants and can discuss all treatment options with you.
